matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The Brazilian Forest Service LPF page explicitly identifies the record as Andira surinamensis = Andira retusa and captions this image Corte tangencial.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at original resolution. The image is entirely a clean longitudinal wood surface with visible grain; no tree, foliage, bark exterior, furniture, generic texture, diagram, or microscopy appears.
matchedCandidate.creator: Serviço Florestal Brasileiro, Laboratório de Produtos Florestais (LPF/SFB)
